Build a JSON codec using stable object-key ordering.

## Import

```ts
import { jsonCodecFor } from "@graphrefly/ts";
```

## Signature

```ts
function jsonCodecFor(): Codec<T>
```

## Returns

A `Codec<T>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { jsonCodecFor } from "@graphrefly/ts";
```
